reference: Hi, I would like to know about general anesthesia during wisdom teeth removal. What are the risks associated with this type of operation, and what could go wrong? Is there anything to be concerned about regarding the breathing tube and ensuring the right amount of oxygen? How would you know if you did not receive enough oxygen? Will health professionals inform the patient if anything like this happened?
text: Hi, I would like to know about general anesthesia during resuscitation. What are the risks associated with the type of operation, and what could go wrong? Is there anything to be concerned about regarding the breathing tube and ensuring the right amount of oxygen? How would you know if you do not receive enough oxygen? Will health professionals inform the patient if anything like this happens?
